assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 17-19 show 'git checkout TC-9005' followed by 'git pull' under section '1. Checkout the Target Branch (TC-9005)'. Line 15 explicitly states 'The Target Branch field specifies TC-9005, which is a feature branch (not main).' The task branch is then created from this in section 2.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 36 shows 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"'. Line 44 reinforces: 'The --base TC-9005 flag is critical -- it ensures the PR targets the feature branch, not main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 27 shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205' to create the task branch. Line 24 explicitly distinguishes: 'The task branch is named after this task's Jira issue ID (TC-9205), which is distinct from the feature branch (TC-9005)'. Line 35 shows 'git push -u origin TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md section 'Pre-Implementation Inspection (Step 4)' at lines 84-95 lists all three files: '1. migration/src/lib.rs -- Understand the current migration registration pattern', '2. migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs -- Understand the sibling migration pattern', '3. entity/src/advisory.rs -- Verify that the status column is no longer referenced in the entity definition'.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 59 shows 'With trailer: --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"'. Line 64 shows the full command: 'git commit --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code" -m "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table"'.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 49 shows the commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows type(scope): description format. Line 56 shows 'Implements TC-9205' in the footer, referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 8 explicitly states 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch, NOT main)'. Lines 14-15 elaborate: 'The Target Branch field specifies TC-9005, which is a feature branch (not main). The task branch must be created from this feature branch'.
